requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light & Optical Radiation (CS / IEC 62471)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光与光辐射（CS / IEC 62471）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光與光輻射（CS / IEC 62471）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of lamps and luminaires references IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which ISC may adopt or reference as a Cambodian Standard for regulated lighting products. The standard classifies products by retinal blue-light hazard and other optical-radiation hazards into Exempt Group, Risk Group 1, 2, or 3, and informs hazard labelling. Cambodia does not impose an EU-style mandatory blue-light hazard packaging mark via a horizontal regulation; instead, where IEC 62471 is part of an applicable CS standard or product specification, the assessment is expected as part of ISC conformity / import inspection or customer requirements. Most general-service LED lamps fall in the Exempt Group or Risk Group 1.
summary.zh: 灯与灯具的光生物安全参考 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），ISC 可将其采纳或参考为受管制照明产品的柬埔寨标准。该标准按视网膜蓝光危害及其他光辐射危害将产品分为豁免组、危险组 1、2 或 3，并指导危害标识。柬埔寨不通过横向法规施加欧盟式强制蓝光危害包装标志；当 IEC 62471 属于适用 CS 标准或产品规范的一部分时，该评估预期作为 ISC 合格评定/进口检验或客户要求的一部分进行。多数普通照明 LED 灯属豁免组或危险组 1。
summary.zht: 燈與燈具的光生物安全參考 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），ISC 可將其採納或參考為受管制照明產品的柬埔寨標準。該標準按視網膜藍光危害及其他光輻射危害將產品分為豁免組、危險組 1、2 或 3，並指導危害標識。柬埔寨不通過橫向法規施加歐盟式強制藍光危害包裝標誌；當 IEC 62471 屬於適用 CS 標準或產品規範的一部分時，該評估預期作為 ISC 合格評定/進口檢驗或客戶要求的一部分進行。多數普通照明 LED 燈屬豁免組或危險組 1。

standards_or_laws: CS / IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (IEC base ISC may adopt / reference)
Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) — conformity / import inspection where photobiological safety forms part of an applicable CS standard or product specification

summary.en: China assesses photobiological safety through GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems, identical-in-content adoption of CIE S 009 / IEC 62471) and references blue-light hazard grouping in product and CCC-related documentation, e.g. via GB 7000.1 luminaire requirements and lamp standards. The risk-group classification method is the same as the IEC 62471 base ISC references, so a Chinese GB/T 20145 photobiological report is technically comparable, but it is not automatically recognised under the Cambodian conformity / import-inspection pathway.
summary.zh: 中国通过 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全，等同采用 CIE S 009 / IEC 62471）评估光生物安全，并在产品及 CCC 相关文件中参考蓝光危害分组，例如经 GB 7000.1 灯具要求及灯标准。其危险组分类方法与 ISC 参考的 IEC 62471 基础相同，故中国 GB/T 20145 光生物报告技术上可比，但在柬埔寨合格评定/进口检验路径下不被自动认可。
summary.zht: 中國通過 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全，等同採用 CIE S 009 / IEC 62471）評估光生物安全，並在產品及 CCC 相關文件中參考藍光危害分組，例如經 GB 7000.1 燈具要求及燈標準。其危險組分類方法與 ISC 參考的 IEC 62471 基礎相同，故中國 GB/T 20145 光生物報告技術上可比，但在柬埔寨合格評定/進口檢驗路徑下不被自動認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (adoption of CIE S 009 / IEC 62471)
GB/T 7000.1-2023 — luminaire requirements referencing photobiological hazard where applicable

gap.en: The classification method is common: Cambodia (CS/IEC 62471) and China (GB/T 20145) both derive from IEC 62471 / CIE S 009. The differences are practical: (1) Cambodia has no EU-style horizontal regulation mandating a blue-light hazard packaging label across all LED products — the IEC 62471 assessment matters where it is part of an applicable CS standard, product specification, or buyer requirement, rather than as a universal legal packaging mandate; (2) a Chinese GB/T 20145 photobiological report is technically comparable but is not automatically recognised — confirm with ISC and the importer whether an existing report supports import inspection or whether re-assessment to the CS/IEC reference is needed; (3) Risk Group 2+ products (rare for general LED lamps) warrant particular attention to any labelling expectations. No EU-equivalent blue-light hazard class is legally required for general-service lamps unless tied to a specific CS standard.
gap.zh: 分类方法共通：柬埔寨（CS/IEC 62471）与中国（GB/T 20145）均源自 IEC 62471 / CIE S 009。差异为实务性：（1）柬埔寨没有欧盟式横向法规要求所有 LED 产品强制标注蓝光危害包装标签——IEC 62471 评估在其属于适用 CS 标准、产品规范或买方要求一部分时才重要，而非作为普遍法律包装强制；（2）中国 GB/T 20145 光生物报告技术上可比，但不被自动认可——应向 ISC 及进口商确认现有报告能否支持进口检验，或须按 CS/IEC 参考重新评估；（3）危险组 2 及以上产品（普通 LED 灯罕见）应特别关注任何标识预期。除非与特定 CS 标准挂钩，普通照明灯无须强制标注欧盟式蓝光危害等级。
gap.zht: 分類方法共通：柬埔寨（CS/IEC 62471）與中國（GB/T 20145）均源自 IEC 62471 / CIE S 009。差異為實務性：（1）柬埔寨沒有歐盟式橫向法規要求所有 LED 產品強制標註藍光危害包裝標籤——IEC 62471 評估在其屬於適用 CS 標準、產品規範或買方要求一部分時才重要，而非作為普遍法律包裝強制；（2）中國 GB/T 20145 光生物報告技術上可比，但不被自動認可——應向 ISC 及進口商確認現有報告能否支持進口檢驗，或須按 CS/IEC 參考重新評估；（3）危險組 2 及以上產品（普通 LED 燈罕見）應特別關注任何標識預期。除非與特定 CS 標準掛鈎，普通照明燈無須強制標註歐盟式藍光危害等級。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — IEC 62471 photobiological assessment applies where part of an applicable CS standard, product specification, or buyer requirement; no EU-style universal blue-light hazard packaging mandate
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended standard; photobiological safety referenced within luminaire/lamp requirements where applicable

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological safety for Cambodia references the IEC 62471 base ISC may adopt; classification matches China's GB/T 20145 method. Cambodia has no EU-style horizontal mandate for a universal blue-light hazard packaging label — IEC 62471 matters where it is part of an applicable CS standard, product specification, or buyer requirement. A Chinese GB/T 20145 report is technically comparable but not automatically recognised; confirm with ISC and the importer whether it supports import inspection or re-assessment is needed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨光生物安全参考 ISC 可采纳的 IEC 62471 基础；分类与中国 GB/T 20145 方法一致。柬埔寨没有欧盟式横向强制的普遍蓝光危害包装标签——IEC 62471 在其属于适用 CS 标准、产品规范或买方要求一部分时才重要。中国 GB/T 20145 报告技术上可比但不被自动认可；应向 ISC 及进口商确认其能否支持进口检验或须重新评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨光生物安全參考 ISC 可採納的 IEC 62471 基礎；分類與中國 GB/T 20145 方法一致。柬埔寨沒有歐盟式橫向強制的普遍藍光危害包裝標籤——IEC 62471 在其屬於適用 CS 標準、產品規範或買方要求一部分時才重要。中國 GB/T 20145 報告技術上可比但不被自動認可；應向 ISC 及進口商確認其能否支持進口檢驗或須重新評估。

requirement_topic.en: Hazard Labelling & Product Information (CS / IEC 62471 marking practice)
requirement_topic.zh: 危害标识与产品信息（CS / IEC 62471 标识实践）
requirement_topic.zht: 危害標識與產品信息（CS / IEC 62471 標識實踐）

summary.en: Where a product is assessed under IEC 62471 and falls in Risk Group 1 or higher, the standard and associated technical reports (e.g. IEC TR 62471-2 for manufacturing guidance) indicate hazard information and, for higher groups, warning labelling. In Cambodia, the obligation to display such information is driven by the applicable CS / IEC product standard, ISC conformity / import-inspection requirements for the regulated product, and buyer or sectoral specifications, rather than by a standalone EU-style packaging-label regulation. Importers should ensure that any required group classification, viewing-distance notes, and warnings are present in a form acceptable to ISC and end customers; product information may need to be available in Khmer or as agreed with the importer.
summary.zh: 当产品依 IEC 62471 评定并属危险组 1 或更高时，标准及相关技术报告（如制造指导用 IEC TR 62471-2）给出危害信息，对更高组别给出警示标识。在柬埔寨，展示此类信息的义务由适用 CS / IEC 产品标准、受管制产品的 ISC 合格评定/进口检验要求及买方或行业规范驱动，而非由独立的欧盟式包装标签法规驱动。进口商应确保任何要求的组别分类、观察距离说明及警示以 ISC 与最终客户可接受的形式呈现；产品信息可能须提供高棉文或按与进口商约定提供。
summary.zht: 當產品依 IEC 62471 評定並屬危險組 1 或更高時，標準及相關技術報告（如製造指導用 IEC TR 62471-2）給出危害信息，對更高組別給出警示標識。在柬埔寨，展示此類信息的義務由適用 CS / IEC 產品標準、受管制產品的 ISC 合格評定/進口檢驗要求及買方或行業規範驅動，而非由獨立的歐盟式包裝標籤法規驅動。進口商應確保任何要求的組別分類、觀察距離說明及警示以 ISC 與最終客戶可接受的形式呈現；產品信息可能須提供高棉文或按與進口商約定提供。

standards_or_laws: CS / IEC 62471 and IEC TR 62471-2 — photobiological hazard classification and manufacturing/labelling guidance (as referenced by ISC where applicable)
Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) — import inspection / product information expectations for regulated lighting

summary.en: In China, hazard grouping and information practice follow GB/T 20145 (photobiological safety) together with the marking and information requirements of GB/T 7000.1 and the relevant lamp standards. Product markings and instructions are generally provided in Chinese for the domestic market. The technical grouping basis matches the IEC 62471 reference, but the language, format, and the regulatory hook (CCC / GB) are Chinese-domestic and do not transfer automatically to Cambodian import requirements.
summary.zh: 在中国，危害分组与信息实践遵循 GB/T 20145（光生物安全）以及 GB/T 7000.1 和相关灯标准的标识与信息要求。产品标识与说明通常以中文提供供国内市场使用。技术分组依据与 IEC 62471 参考一致，但语言、格式及监管挂钩（CCC / GB）属中国国内，且不自动转移至柬埔寨进口要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，危害分組與信息實踐遵循 GB/T 20145（光生物安全）以及 GB/T 7000.1 和相關燈標準的標識與信息要求。產品標識與說明通常以中文提供供國內市場使用。技術分組依據與 IEC 62471 參考一致，但語言、格式及監管掛鈎（CCC / GB）屬中國國內，且不自動轉移至柬埔寨進口要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — marking and product information requirements for luminaires

gap.en: Both sides classify hazards the same way (IEC 62471 base). The Cambodian gap is about the trigger and presentation of information, not the science: (1) Cambodia has no horizontal regulation universally mandating a photobiological hazard label — the obligation arises from the applicable CS / IEC product standard, ISC import-inspection requirements, or buyer specification; (2) Chinese-language markings prepared for the domestic market may need to be supplemented in Khmer or English as agreed with the importer and acceptable to ISC; (3) any Risk Group 2+ warning content should be confirmed for format and placement; (4) a Chinese GB/T 20145 classification can usually be reused as technical evidence, but its acceptance for Cambodian import inspection should be confirmed with ISC and the in-country importer.
gap.zh: 双方危害分类方法相同（IEC 62471 基础）。柬埔寨差距在于信息的触发与呈现，而非科学本身：（1）柬埔寨没有普遍强制光生物危害标签的横向法规——义务源自适用 CS / IEC 产品标准、ISC 进口检验要求或买方规范；（2）为国内市场准备的中文标识可能须按与进口商约定并经 ISC 接受的方式补充高棉文或英文；（3）任何危险组 2 及以上的警示内容应确认格式与位置；（4）中国 GB/T 20145 分类通常可作为技术证据重用，但其用于柬埔寨进口检验的接受程度应向 ISC 及在地进口商确认。
gap.zht: 雙方危害分類方法相同（IEC 62471 基礎）。柬埔寨差距在於信息的觸發與呈現，而非科學本身：（1）柬埔寨沒有普遍強制光生物危害標籤的橫向法規——義務源自適用 CS / IEC 產品標準、ISC 進口檢驗要求或買方規範；（2）為國內市場準備的中文標識可能須按與進口商約定並經 ISC 接受的方式補充高棉文或英文；（3）任何危險組 2 及以上的警示內容應確認格式與位置；（4）中國 GB/T 20145 分類通常可作為技術證據重用，但其用於柬埔寨進口檢驗的接受程度應向 ISC 及在地進口商確認。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — hazard information / labelling expected where required by an applicable CS / IEC standard, ISC import inspection, or buyer specification; no EU-style universal label mandate; product information may need Khmer/English
mandatory_status.cn: Marking and information per GB/T 7000.1 and GB/T 20145 for the domestic market; generally provided in Chinese

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological hazard information for Cambodia follows the IEC 62471 classification ISC may adopt, with the labelling obligation triggered by an applicable CS / IEC standard, ISC import inspection, or buyer specification rather than an EU-style universal packaging mandate. A Chinese GB/T 20145 classification is technically reusable, but acceptance and the language/format of product information should be confirmed with ISC and the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨光生物危害信息遵循 ISC 可采纳的 IEC 62471 分类，标识义务由适用 CS / IEC 标准、ISC 进口检验或买方规范触发，而非欧盟式普遍包装强制。中国 GB/T 20145 分类技术上可重用，但其接受程度及产品信息的语言/格式应向 ISC 及在地进口商确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨光生物危害信息遵循 ISC 可採納的 IEC 62471 分類，標識義務由適用 CS / IEC 標準、ISC 進口檢驗或買方規範觸發，而非歐盟式普遍包裝強制。中國 GB/T 20145 分類技術上可重用，但其接受程度及產品信息的語言/格式應向 ISC 及在地進口商確認。
